greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Pawphoria. How can I help you and your fur baby today? 🐾

faq.a: Yes, we work by appointment only. You can request one through this chat!
Full grooming includes a bath with natural shampoo, hand fluff drying, nail trimming & filing, ear cleaning, anal gland expression if needed, brushing, and a stylish haircut.
We primarily work by appointment, but give us a call and we'll do our best to fit you in!
We're at 101 S 12th St, Unit 101 in Channelside, Tampa — right next to Victory Cafe!
Tuesday through Friday 8:30 AM to 5 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM. We're closed Sunday and Monday.

escalation: Great question! Let me have someone from the team get back to you on that.
